Heat causes thermal expansion. Friction generates heat. Fire produces light. Fire produces smoke. Water extinguishes fire. Pressure increases temperature. Gravity pulls objects down. Sunlight enables photosynthesis. Photosynthesis produces oxygen. Exercise improves health. Stress damages health. Sleep restores energy. Education improves opportunity. Practice improves skill. Rain causes flooding. Drought reduces crops. Pollution damages environment. Vaccination prevents disease. Infection causes illness.
